name: Runic Initiation
description: Archmage Goja's workshop lies dormant. Channel your first rune: declare the mana reserve and charge it to full to ignite the stone campfire.
template_code: // Declare a variable named mana_current and assign it the value 100.

flaws.name: Channel the Rune
flaws.flavor_text: Submit your rune inscription to the leyline for validation.
